channel.title: Blog — JOSE Anthony
channel.description: Technical articles on Linux administration, automation (Bash/Ansible) and experience reports.

item.title: My smart home with Home Assistant
item.description: Experience report: full home automation setup with sensors, YAML automations and a centralized dashboard.

item.title: Building a team planning app with Flutter and Firebase
item.description: Experience report: developing a mobile event management app with attendance, PDF export and notifications.

item.title: Building a photobooth and its rental website
item.description: Experience report: from hardware assembly to building the rental website with online booking.

item.title: Automating application purge with Shell and Ansible
item.description: Experience report: automating obsolete version removal on ~300 Linux servers with Bash and Ansible.
